error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: DeepSeek authorization failure
symptom: When attempting to connect to the DeepSeek chat model, n8n returns 'Authorization failed - please check your credentials'. This occurs despite using the correct API key that works with the HTTPRequest node.
not_this_if: HTTP requests with the same credentials succeed
root_cause: The error may occur due to conflicts between the community version of the DeepSeek node and the built-in version after an upgrade. This can lead to authorization issues as the system may not correctly handle the credentials.
fix_steps: Remove the DeepSeek community node from your n8n installation
Ensure you are using the built-in DeepSeek node
Test the connection again with the correct credentials
agent_instruction: Remove the community DeepSeek node and restart n8n to resolve the authorization issue.
